title: Contribution by Tencent: wrong default value of geometry column
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 AS SELECT ST_POINTFROMGEOHASH("0123", 4326);
key_bug_features: Wrong default value for geometry column with binlog_format=row
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY DEFAULT ST_POINTFROMGEOHASH('abcd', 4326));
SELECT id, ST_AsText(geom) FROM t2 WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 AS SELECT ST_PointFromText('POINT(1 1)', 4326) AS geom;
